tweets.text:
Not everyone online is who they say they are. 🚨

Kendall Carter is serving 30 years for victimizing more than a dozen teens and children.

Help young people spot #FakeProfiles before harm happens using the Tips2Identify Fake Profiles resource at https://t.co/niLXazT8VJ https://t.co/pMkjZsa94V

tweets.text:
MASSIVE HUMAN SMUGGLING ATTEMPT THWARTED

ICE HSI, @CBP and local police intercepted a vessel off the coast of Puerto Rico transporting 58 Dominican nationals and 6 Haitian nationals May 9.

Aliens taken into custody in U.S. territory have been processed for removal proceedings. https://t.co/Z86lx0Nve7
